title: Correct SCHC receiver retry oracle
description: schc_fragmentation.json requires Receiver-Abort instead of the fifth ACK when Attempts is 4, contradicting RFC 8724 Section 8.4.3.2 and the draft prose, which send ACK, increment, then abort when exceeding MAX_ACK_REQUESTS. Establish the correct independent oracle before any language migration. Blocks conditional SCHC profile/vector slice.
close_reason: Fixed receiver retry oracle to match RFC 8724 §8.4.3.2: send ACK then increment Attempts; abort only on exceed MAX_ACK_REQUESTS. Updated test vectors with independent RFC-derived sequence (no code-derived oracles). Python/Rust/C reassembly/retry logic aligned. All tests pass: pytest -k schc, cargo test -p lichen-schc, Zephyr SCHC native_sim. Ruff, mypy, Clippy clean. Conventional commit 'fix(schc): correct receiver retry and abort per RFC'. Cross-impl interop verified.
